data.title: Manus responded to the freezing of X account: We are working on it and have never participated in cryptocurrency projects
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Manus co-founder and chief scientist Yichao Peak Ji (Ji Yichao) issued a statement on X: "Our official X account (@ManusAI_HQ) was accidentally frozen yesterday. We are actively working with the X team to resolve this matter. Initial observations indicate that the freeze may be related to third-party references to cryptocurrency scams. To clarify: Manus has never been involved in cryptocurrency projects, token issuance or blockchain initiatives, and any cryptocurrency businesses with similar names claiming to be associated with us are fraudulent. We are taking legal action against these imposters and encourage users to report suspicious accounts." (Jinshi)

data.title: Cryptocurrency industry elites gathered at the White House to discuss promoting the United States to become the "cryptocurrency capital of the world"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cryptocurrency industry elites will meet with US President Trump at the White House on Friday to discuss how the US government will realize Trump's vision of making the United States the "cryptocurrency capital of the world." According to executives' posts on social media, Trump will receive participants including Michael Saylor, founder of cryptocurrency company Strategy, Zach Witkoff, co-founder of World Liberty Financial (WLFI), a crypto project related to the Trump family, and Vlad Tenev, CEO of Robinhood (HOOD.O). Participants expect the event to focus on Trump's plan to establish a strategic reserve of Bitcoin and four other currencies. In addition, they are optimistic about working with a government that regards cryptocurrencies as a mainstream asset class and hope that the regulatory process will be relatively simple. (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve Chair Powell to Address Economic Impact of Tariffs
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell is set to deliver a public speech tonight, providing an opportunity to assess the economic impact of U.S. President Donald Trump's imposition of high tariffs on major trade partners. While these policy changes have occurred rapidly, their effects are not yet evident beyond the daily fluctuations in stock, bond, and foreign exchange markets. However, collectively, they have reignited discussions among forecasters about the risk of 'stagflation.' Adam Posen, Director of the Peterson Institute for International Economics in Washington, stated that while the Federal Reserve is not responsible for setting trade or tax policies, it should clearly indicate that, based on all existing mainstream evidence, tariffs are more likely to lead to increased inflation. At the time of Trump's tariff implementation, inflation levels were not low.

data.title: LBank has launched ELX U-margined perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank has launched the ELX U-based perpetual contract at 19:10 (SGT) on March 7, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50 times.

data.title: Trump’s Bitcoin Reserve Order Fails to Stop Crypto Market Slump—What’s Next?
data.description:
TL;DR President Trump’s executive order to create a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve aims to position Bitcoin alongside gold reserves, funded by seized assets without taxpayer expense. The announcement triggered a crypto market slump, with Bitcoin and major altcoins like Ethereum, XRP, and Solana experiencing significant price drops. Uncertainty looms as analysts debate the reserve’s long-term...
source: https://crypto-economy.com/trumps-bitcoin-reserve-order-fails-to-stop-crypto-market-slump-whats-next/

data.title: Trump confused by Strategic Bitcoin Reserve he just ordered
data.description:
Despite giving an order authorizing US Treasury Secretaries to buy BTC, Trump apparently struggled to understand the text in front of him.
The post Trump confused by Strategic Bitcoin Reserve he just ordered appeared first on Protos.
source: https://protos.com/trump-confused-by-strategic-bitcoin-reserve-he-just-ordered/

data.title: The U.S. Treasury Department will establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve and a digital asset reserve custody account
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the White House official website announcement, Trump signed an executive order on March 6, 2025 to formally establish the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and the U.S. Digital Asset Stockpile to strengthen the government's management of digital assets. The executive order requires the Treasury Department to set up a special agency to manage and control custodial accounts and manage Bitcoin and other digital assets held by the government, which are mainly derived from criminal or civil forfeiture. The executive order also restricts the government from selling or disposing of these assets unless it involves legal requirements, compensation for crime victims, or law enforcement purposes. Each federal agency must submit a report on its digital assets within 30 days, and the Treasury Department will evaluate management and legislative needs within 60 days.

data.title: Foreign media: Trump may sign more executive orders before speaking at the White House cryptocurrency summit
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump will deliver a speech at the White House Cryptocurrency Summit, emphasizing the industry he promised to help during the campaign. Since returning to the White House, he has given positive treatment to the industry through executive orders and other actions. It is reported that before delivering the speech, Trump plans to issue more executive orders, and the White House has not yet disclosed the theme. (Washington Post)

data.title: Bitwise: Trump's strategic Bitcoin reserve will have a chain reaction, and other countries may follow suit
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Analysts said that Trump's US Bitcoin reserves are expected to promote the global adoption of Bitcoin, promote institutional investment and consolidate its status as a strategic asset. Ryan Rasmussen, head of research at Bitwise, expects that the US Bitcoin reserves will have a chain effect, and other countries and private investors will be more confident in investing in Bitcoin. The final result will by no means be the US government buying all the Bitcoin in the world. In addition, large institutional investors, such as wealth management companies, financial institutions and pension plans, now have no reason not to increase their investment in Bitcoin and other crypto assets recognized by the Trump administration. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Viewpoint: The expectation of "no selling" has been digested by the market, and the crypto industry hopes that the US government will buy and accumulate Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump has signed an executive order to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve and a separate digital asset reserve. These cryptocurrencies are obtained through confiscation, but the US government will not acquire additional assets for the reserve. Steven Lubka, head of private clients and family offices at Swan Bitcoin, a Bitcoin-focused financial services company, said that while not selling confiscated Bitcoins may be a good start, the crypto industry ultimately hopes to see the US government buy and accumulate Bitcoins. Not selling confiscated Bitcoins is primarily beneficial at the signal and narrative level, but the news has been digested by much of the market. (marketwatch)
